Off Calendar May-02-2016 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar May-02-2016 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of Reserve
Off Calendar Apr-04-2016 Continued To May-02-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the administrator Marie Bond and the Attorney Bonnie Landles-Dowling to appear on May 2, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they did not appear to report on the status on distribution of reserve. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Fender. (Not Reported)
